case_title: SANDRA DA MATE VS. ELIZABETH CARNEY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-19-2018 BY CHARLES F. HAINES. PLAINTIFF SANDRA DA MATE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ELIZABETH CARNERY IS PRESENT. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,700.00 FILED BY DA MATE, SANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT CARNEY, ELIZABETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-20-2017 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DA MATE, SANDRA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CARNEY, ELIZABETH STATUE OF LIMITATIONS CCP 339 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DA MATE, SANDRA

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 SERVED OCT-05-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARNEY, ELIZABETH

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2017 - APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, CONTINUED TO JAN-19-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. JPT JASON JUNGREIS; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. WAIVED NOTICE. (306)
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DA MATE, SANDRA
